name: Deluxe Chocolate Chunk Walnut Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Unsalted butter (6 oz at room temperature)
1 1/2 cups Light or dark brown sugar (firmly packed)
2 cups Swiss semisweet chocolate in small chunks
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Line a baking sheet with baking parchment.
1. Cream the butter and shortening with the sugar and salt until light and well blended.
2. Stir in the vanilla and egg.
3. Stir in the flour and baking soda and mix well.
4. Fold in the nuts and chocolate chunks.
5. Form into generous tablespoons of batter and drop onto the lined baking sheet, pressing down slightly on the dough about 2 inches apart.
6. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes until lightly golden in color and browned at the edges. (Makes about 2 1/2 dozen).
For a more tender, crisper, buttery cookie, reduce flour to 1 3/4 cups.
